nasb.text: Now there were six stone waterpots set there for the Jewish custom of purification, containing twenty or thirty gallons each.

esv.text: Now there were six stone water jars there for the Jewish rites of purification, each holding twenty or thirty gallons.

cnv.text: 在那裡有六口石缸，每口可盛兩三桶水，是為猶太人行潔淨禮用的。

ccb.text: 那里有六口犹太人用来行洁净礼仪的石缸，每口可以盛约一百升水。

csbs.text: 照犹太人洁净的规矩，有六口石缸摆在那里。每缸可容两三桶水。
